children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read and store raw input data into raw_data store
children.behavior: Parse input JSON, extract source, read data from source, store in raw_data, log ingestion

semantic_outputs.name: ingestion_result
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success status and records count

guarantees: raw_data is stored for further processing

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: store ingested raw data for downstream processing

outputs.name: ingestion_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records count

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw data and store in processed_data
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply transformations (e.g., cleaning, mapping), write to processed_data, log transformation

semantic_outputs.name: transformation_result
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success status and records transformed

outputs.name: transformation_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records transformed

children.name: ValidateQuality
children.purpose: Check processed data for quality and filter valid records
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply validation rules (e.g., schema, range), mark invalid records, log validation results

semantic_outputs.name: validation_result
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with valid records count and errors list

guarantees: invalid records are excluded from export

outputs.name: validation_result
outputs.description: JSON with valid records count and errors list

children.name: ExportResults
children.purpose: Export only valid records to output
children.behavior: Read valid records from processed_data (based on validation), format output JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data, log export

semantic_inputs.name: valid_records
semantic_inputs.description: Indication of which records are valid from validation

semantic_outputs.name: output
semantic_outputs.description: Final JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data

call_inputs.name: validation_result
call_inputs.description: Validation result containing valid records info

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: read processed data to extract valid records

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: Final JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data

dataflow_edges.note: ValidateQuality returns validation result to parent
parent passes validation result to ExportResults
ExportResults returns final output to parent

interface_audit.identity_preservation_detail: All four child names (IngestData, TransformData, ValidateQuality, ExportResults) are preserved exactly as in Stage 1. No children were added, deleted, renamed, or reordered.
interface_audit.semantic_preservation_detail: All Stage 1 fields (purpose, behavior, boundary, preconditions, postconditions, guarantees, composition_role) are copied verbatim without any changes.
interface_audit.call_signature_detail: Only call_inputs appear in the Python signature. IngestData receives 'input' from parent. TransformData and ValidateQuality have no call_inputs (they access data stores internally). ExportResults receives 'validation_result' from parent. Internal leaf accesses (raw_data, processed_data) are excluded from signatures.
interface_audit.internal_leaf_separation_detail: Data stores (raw_data, processed_data) are listed under internal_leaf_accesses, not call_inputs, because they are accessed internally by the child's implementation and not passed by the parent. This keeps the interface clean and the signature focused on parent-child communication.
interface_audit.dataflow_schema_detail: All dataflow edges use only 'parent' or exact child names as from_node/to_node. No resource/store names (raw_data, processed_data) appear as endpoints. Edges correctly connect parent to children and children back to parent.
